criteria.name: New Function: _hffmc_calc
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py at HEAD does not define `_hffmc_calc`; rg for `_hffmc_calc` only found the Phase 12 spec, so the canonical hourly FFMC function is absent.

criteria.name: New Function: _daily_dmc_dc_calc
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py at HEAD does not define `_daily_dmc_dc_calc`; the daily-only DMC/DC helper required by Phase 12 is missing.

criteria.name: New Function: calculate_fwi_hourly
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py at HEAD does not define `calculate_fwi_hourly`; the new hourly entry point required by Phase 12 is absent.

criteria.name: Rename Current Function
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py does not define `_calculate_fwi_legacy`; the legacy hourly calculation was not renamed and preserved for comparison testing.

criteria.name: Pipeline Routing Update
criteria.evidence: Because `calculate_fwi_hourly` is absent from src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py, the pipeline cannot route `hourly`/`extended` mode through the Phase 12 implementation.

criteria.name: CLI & Config
criteria.evidence: docs/cleaning-config.json at HEAD still lacks the required Phase 12 `hourly` default/configuration change.

criteria.name: Diagnostics
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py at HEAD contains no `dmc_dc_source_date` support and no Phase 12 daily-source diagnostic evidence.

criteria.name: Tests
criteria.evidence: Phase 12 test coverage is missing or not green: tests/test_phase12_wagner_hourly.py exists=False and `.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q` exited 1. criteria.name: Output Files
criteria.evidence: The required hourly output audit column `dmc_dc_source_date` is not present in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py, so Phase 12 output-file requirements are not met.

failing_nodes.message: Phase 12 criterion 12.1 failed: missing `_hffmc_calc` hourly FFMC implementation.
Phase 12 criterion 12.2 failed: missing `_daily_dmc_dc_calc` daily DMC/DC helper.
Phase 12 criterion 12.3 failed: missing `calculate_fwi_hourly` entry point.
Phase 12 criterion 12.4 failed: legacy FWI implementation was not preserved as `_calculate_fwi_legacy`.
Phase 12 criterion 12.5 failed: pipeline routing cannot target the missing hourly implementation.
Phase 12 criterion 12.6 failed: config was not updated to make `hourly` the default FWI mode.
Phase 12 criterion 12.7 failed: missing `dmc_dc_source_date` / daily-source diagnostics support.
Phase 12 criterion 12.8 failed: required `tests/test_phase12_wagner_hourly.py` is missing from HEAD.
Full suite failed during Lisa review; current HEAD is not green.
Phase 12 criterion 12.9 failed: hourly outputs lack required `dmc_dc_source_date` audit column support.

summary: Lisa review REJECT for Phase 12: the current HEAD still lacks the core Phase 12 implementation in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py (`_hffmc_calc`, `_daily_dmc_dc_calc`, `calculate_fwi_hourly`, `_calculate_fwi_legacy`), the required Phase 12 test file is absent, the required output audit column is missing, and the mandated full-suite pytest run is not green. Artifact validation and pre-flight are both SKIP from the previous phase, and Martin lint reports only medium/low issues, so the rejection is based on unmet Phase 12 acceptance criteria rather than test-lint blockers.
